reviews.title: Mr. Boombastic, Call me fantastic ✨
reviews.text: Have had this speaker for 6 years now and it’s still going strong. Very durable, Ive accidentally dropped it a few times and nothing has happened to it. It’s been through beach days, hikes, parties, hangouts, rain, and sun exposure for long periods of time. Quality and volume range is great for its size. Battery will last a long time, one charge lasts me 5-6 days playing 2-3 hours. Battery doesn’t wear it when you don’t use it  or let it sit for a long time either. I don’t expect to get a new one soon, but I will repurchase if it ever gives out.

reviews.title: Bose Quality, Bose Price
reviews.text:
Pros:
- Crystal Clear sound, like you would expect from a Bose product
- Charges in an hour; lasts 15'ish (best estimate)
- Aesthetically pleasing
- Integrated with iPhone in seconds
- My first Bluetooth speaker that does phone calls very, very well

Cons:
- Price
- Bass really only works on solid surfaces that are large
- No cover for micro-usb charge port; so maybe avoid dirty places

Overall, this has been a great replacement to our former JBL. While the outright cost seems high, the investment in a Bose product, in my experience, is worth the money in the long run.

reviews.title: Excellent...while it lasts.
reviews.text:
This speaker was great while it was working properly.  It's got full, rich, well-balanced surround sound.  It's a significant improvement over the next cheaper Bose option.  

However, after about a year and a half, I started having connectivity issues.  Seemingly very randomly, it suddenly wouldn't connect to any of the two or three devices I use with it.  I'd wipe the device list, shut it off, re-pair and it would usually work again.  Now, it simply won't connect to certain devices no matter how many times I reset it to factory settings.  

I've had it for less than three years and it's just about unusable now.  Not to sound TOO bitter, but I did expect more from the Bose name.  Anyway, not a bad investment if you consider it more of a long-term rental.
